decisions.decision: Approved Plan 26.7-06 despite the Drop panic at subagent_registry.rs:86 surfacing in UAT
decisions.rationale: Plan 26.7-06's explicit scope (three write-op endpoints) was met — all returned 200, zero shrike.rs panics. The Drop panic was the deferred follow-up the plan's <out_of_scope> block explicitly named. Spawning 26.7-07 was the cleaner ship path than reopening 26.7-06.

decisions.decision: Used merge-to-develop-first pattern instead of testing from worktree (same as 26.7-06)
decisions.rationale: dx serve does not run cleanly from a worktree path due to dx 0.7.1 looking up files that exist in the main checkout but not in the fresh worktree.

decisions.decision: Option C: std::thread::spawn + handle.block_on + thread.join() instead of Handle::try_current().spawn(async) in Drop body (APPROVED DEVIATION from PLAN.md)
decisions.rationale: The plan's tokio::spawn(async) pattern introduced eventual consistency that broke 2 pre-existing tests at subagent_registry.rs (register_then_drop_guard_leaves_count_zero, list_preserves_all_entries) which assume sync Drop semantics with a single yield_now(). Option C uses a fresh OS thread to escape any LocalSet (no tokio runtime affiliation) and joins to preserve synchronous Drop — tests pass without modification. The plan explicitly said 'if a test breaks under cargo test, FAIL the build and ask the orchestrator — do NOT silently add yield_now calls into tests', and Option C honored that.

background_processes.context: Post-merge test gate for Plan 26.7-07. Executor already ran cargo test in the worktree and reported all 305+ tests pass. This background run is the post-merge confirmation on develop. If it fails, the failures will be pre-existing toolchain issues.

context_notes: We are NOT in a worktree — orchestrator is on main checkout at develop @ 6942f073. The cwd-drift bug (#3174) was hit mid-flight: bash CWD migrated to the worktree path after the executor agent ran, causing 'Already up to date' on the first merge attempt; pinned back with `cd /Users/twilson/code/ironhermes && ...` to recover. Toolchain/env state: dx 0.7.1 (matches Cargo.lock dioxus 0.7.1 — DO NOT upgrade to 0.7.9); ~/.cargo/config.toml has `rustc-wrapper = sccache` set globally, so every dx serve / cargo invocation in user shell must override with `RUSTC_WRAPPER= dx serve` to bypass sccache 0.14.0's rustc detection bug. Pre-existing toolchain debt (NOT this phase's fault): rust-1.94.0 introduces `redundant_closure` (43 in crates/iron_hermes_ui/src/components/warp_hermes.rs) + `collapsible_if` (14 in crates/ironhermes-core/src/skills.rs) lints. Also server_runtime_parity.rs::api_sessions_and_tools_are_backed_by_real_state fails on pre-existing missing Platform::Web.to_string() in api.rs.
